item.title: FedML-AI / FedML
item.description:
Desc: FedML - The federated learning and distributed training library enabling machine learning anywhere at any scale. It's backed by FedML, Inc (https://FedML.ai). Supporting large-scale geo-distributed training, cross-device federated learning on smartphones/IoTs, cross-silo federated learning on data silos, and research simulation. Best Paper Award…
Lang: Python
Star: 1332
